/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/zmr_interfaces/msg/detail/current_future_states__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/zmr_interfaces/srv/detail/get_other_robot_states__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/zmr_interfaces/srv/detail/get_robot_state__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
